rows.label: qev091206_MSG0001
rows.name: Well, look who's back. Done with the mission?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0002
rows.name: You know it. Piece of cake![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0003
rows.name: Difficult cake.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0004
rows.name:
Okaaay. Not going to ask.
In any case, good work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0005
rows.name: You have the sample on you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0006
rows.name: Right here—crystallized phogrium.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0007
rows.name: When did this stuff get a name?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0008
rows.name: When my brother named it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0009
rows.name: I...see...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0010
rows.name: [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0011
rows.name:
In any case, it just looks
like ordinary crystal to me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0012
rows.name:
Applying energy causes it to crystallize.
It's not exactly portable otherwise.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0013
rows.name:
I see. Seems like something
our research team will love.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0014
rows.name:
If we're lucky, it might play a
role in the city's development.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0015
rows.name: All thanks to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0016
rows.name:
Other teams had been stumped for weeks,
but you got it on the first try.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0017
rows.name: You guys are something special.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0018
rows.name: Hey, did you hear that, Frye?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0019
rows.name:
Feels pretty good, huh? Maybe we
should keep this team going.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0020
rows.name: I like that idea a lot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0021
rows.name:
And don't worry, there's a spot
on the team for you, too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_JNK0010
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev091206_SEL0011
rows.name: Agree to join and thank them for the offer.

rows.label: qev091206_JNK0020
rows.name: Decline

rows.label: qev091206_SEL0021
rows.name: Refuse Frye's offer.

rows.label: qev091206_JNK0030
rows.name: Suggest

rows.label: qev091206_SEL0031
rows.name: Say they should call it the Super Christoph Brothers.

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0022
rows.name: Hey, our pleasure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0023
rows.name:
If not for you, Fog Christoph and
me would still be all distant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0024
rows.name: It's true.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0025
rows.name: Really, we're the ones grateful to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0026
rows.name: What he said. Here's hoping you stick around.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0027
rows.name: [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0028
rows.name: [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0029
rows.name: Yeah, okay. It's your call.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0030
rows.name:
But you let us know if you
ever change your mind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0031
rows.name:
Yeah, standing invitation. Hell, it's thanks to
you that Fog Christoph and I are talking again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0032
rows.name:
We've got your back anytime, anywhere.
Whatever you need, you come to us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0033
rows.name:
Yeesh. You're even more random
than Fog Christoph sometimes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0035
rows.name: I love it. Best team name ever![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0036
rows.name: [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0037
rows.name: [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0038
rows.name: Fine, whatever you want.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0039_m
rows.name: Welcome aboard, buddy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091206_MSG0039_f
rows.name: Welcome aboard, buddy.[ST:wait ]
